summary: QuoteRequestForm UX upgrade testing complete. All new features working correctly - multi-select services, grouped sections, dropdowns, form validation, success message, and backend API with new optional fields.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span in option element - dev environment only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Contact form displays 3 grouped sections: YHTEYSTIEDOT, PROJEKTIN TIEDOT, PROJEKTIN KUVAUS
Multi-select service checkboxes: 9 options (Tasoitustyöt, Sisämaalaus, Julkisivumaalaus, Julkisivurappaus, Mikrosementti, Kattomaalaus, Huoltomaalaus, Parvekemaalaus, Muu)
Service checkboxes displayed in 2-column grid on desktop
Service checkboxes displayed in single column on mobile
Dropdown for Kohde: Omakotitalo, Kerrostalo, Taloyhtiö, Toimitila, Muu
Dropdown for Pinta-ala: Alle 50 m², 50–150 m², 150–500 m², Yli 500 m², En osaa sanoa
Dropdown for Aikataulu: Mahdollisimman pian, 1–3 kuukauden sisällä, Myöhemmin, Suunnitteluvaiheessa
Form validation shows errors for required fields (Etunimi, Sukunimi, Sähköposti, Viesti)
Form submission with all fields works correctly
Success message appears after submission: 'Kiitos tarjouspyynnöstäsi!'
Service page form uses QuoteRequestForm with compact variant (hides dropdowns)
Backend accepts new optional fields (services, propertyType, areaSize, location, timeline)
Backend validation rejects missing required fields
All property type options work via API
All area size options work via API
All timeline options work via API
Backward compatibility maintained - form works with only required fields
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteRequestForm component well-structured with proper validation and UX feedback
Backend ContactFormCreate model correctly updated with new optional fields
Mobile responsiveness working - single column on mobile, two columns on desktop
Compact variant for service pages correctly hides dropdowns
Form sections clearly labeled with primary color styling
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuoteRequestForm UX upgrade fully implemented and tested: 1) Multi-select service checkboxes (9 services), 2) Two-column layout desktop / single column mobile, 3) Grouped sections (YHTEYSTIEDOT, PROJEKTIN TIEDOT, PROJEKTIN KUVAUS), 4) New dropdowns (Kohde, Pinta-ala, Aikataulu), 5) Form validation with error messages, 6) Success message on submission, 7) Service page uses compact variant without dropdowns. Backend /api/contact endpoint accepts all new optional fields.

multi_select_services.details: 9 service checkboxes displayed in 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile

grouped_sections.details: Form has 3 sections: YHTEYSTIEDOT, PROJEKTIN TIEDOT, PROJEKTIN KUVAUS

kohde_dropdown.details: Dropdown with options: Omakotitalo, Kerrostalo, Taloyhtiö, Toimitila, Muu

pinta_ala_dropdown.details: Dropdown with options: Alle 50 m², 50–150 m², 150–500 m², Yli 500 m², En osaa sanoa

aikataulu_dropdown.details: Dropdown with options: Mahdollisimman pian, 1–3 kuukauden sisällä, Myöhemmin, Suunnitteluvaiheessa

form_validation.details: Required field validation shows errors for Etunimi, Sukunimi, Sähköposti, Viesti

success_message.details: Success message 'Kiitos tarjouspyynnöstäsi!' appears after submission

service_page_form.details: Service page uses compact variant which hides dropdown fields

backend_api.details: POST /api/contact accepts all new fields (services, propertyType, areaSize, location, timeline)

mobile_responsiveness.details: Single column layout on mobile (390px viewport)
